'''Dictio L'varren''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] to the [[Indu San system/Legends|Indu San system]].<ref name="Kella Rand, Reporting..." />

[[Kella Rand]] had an encounter with L'varren on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. Approximately a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] later on [[Indu San/Legends|Indu San]], she turned in evidence to L'varren, incriminating [[Kaleb Darme]] in the [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] of [[Shek Barayel]], chief [[council]]or of the [[Indu San system/Legends|Indu San system]].<ref name="Kella Rand, Reporting..." />
